name: agent-policy
description: Explicit Agent/Codex diagnostics, AGENTS.md policy guidance, and task-context reconstruction.

interface.shortDescription: Diagnose Agents, guide policies, and structure task context.
interface.longDescription: Use one explicit AgentPolicy entry for Agent/Codex diagnostics, AGENTS.md policy templates, and coherent task-context reconstruction for continuation.
defaultPrompt: Use @AgentPolicy to diagnose the current Agent or Codex environment.
Use @AgentPolicy to show an AGENTS.md policy template.
Use @AgentPolicy to structure the current task context for continuation.
